diff: If market conditions or other factors create an immediate and severe risk of capital impairment, Spark and Arkis are empowered to implement immediate changes to risk parameters and configuration to mitigate risk. Actions taken may include preventing new loans or draws on existing loans, adjusting risk parameters of existing positions including increasing margin requirements or haircuts, demanding immediate repayment, up to and including liquidating high risk positions.
description:
